title: Quadlet service: Failed with result 'protocol'
body:
### Issue Description

service: Failed with result 'protocol'.

### Steps to reproduce the issue


> ~/.config/containers/systemd/sleep.container
```
[Container]
Image = fedora
Exec = sleep 1000
```
> systemctl --user daemon-reload
> systemctl --user start sleep


### Describe the results you received

Container does not run, immediately dies

### Describe the results you expected

Service stays active, container runs

comments.body: Very likely the same as this issue https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/18551 and https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/18103
